headline: Ollies Bargain Outlet (OLLI) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Cut After Analyst Target Trims
summary: The latest analyst work on Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings centers on a reduced fair value estimate, moving from US$114.73 to US$109.13 and signaling a slightly more cautious stance on the stock. This reset lines up with research commentary that trims price targets while debating how much near term earnings and comp risk is already reflected, especially as opinions split over traffic trends, margins, and store growth plans. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the...
